final:
module johnson_counter
(
    input rst,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

    always @(posedge rst) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000; // Clear counter to 0000
        end else begin
            q <= {~q[0], q[3:1]}; // Rotate and invert the MSB
        end
    end

endmodule
